content.intro: The Settings section allows you to manage your personal profile, integrations, and billing.

sections.title: Settings Tabs by Role
sections.content: Settings includes: Profile (your personal details and password), Integrations (deposit protection schemes and utility switching), and Billing (subscription management and payment history).

steps.title: Go to Settings > Profile
steps.content: Click 'Settings' in the sidebar, then ensure the 'Profile' tab is selected.

steps.title: Update personal information
steps.content: Edit your full name and phone number. Note: Your email address cannot be changed.

steps.title: Save changes
steps.content: Click 'Save Changes' to update your profile.

steps.title: Change password (optional)
steps.content: To change your password, scroll to the 'Change Password' section. Enter your new password (minimum 6 characters) and confirm it, then click 'Update Password'.

sections.title: Company Settings
sections.content: You can update your notification email address for offers and references from the settings page. This controls where system notifications are sent.

sections.title: Notification Emails
sections.content: The 'Offer notification email' and 'Reference notification email' fields control where system notifications are sent. These can be different from your personal email.
